mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oj_submission (problem_id, contest_id, user_id, language, code, status, create_time) VALUES (#{problemId}, #{contestId}, #{userId}, #{language}, #{code}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.title AS problem_title FROM oj_submission s LEFT JOIN oj_problem p ON s.problem_id = p.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oj_submission WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT problem_id) FROM oj_submission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'accepted'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT problem_id) FROM oj_submission WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.problem_id) FROM oj_submission s INNER JOIN oj_problem p ON s.problem_id = p.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'accepted' AND p.difficulty = #{difficulty}
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM oj_submission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND problem_id = #{problemId} AND status = 'accepted' )

SELECT user_id AS userId, COUNT(DISTINCT problem_id) AS acceptedCount, COUNT(*) AS submissionCount FROM oj_submission WHERE status = 'accepted' GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY acceptedCount DESC, submissionCount ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT user_id AS userId, COUNT(DISTINCT problem_id) AS acceptedCount, COUNT(*) AS submissionCount FROM oj_submission WHERE status = 'accepted' AND create_time >= #{weekStart} GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY acceptedCount DESC, submissionCount ASC LIMIT #{limit}
